name: apertureos
description: PixelForge monorepo scaffold for browser-first image editing.

scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @pixelforge/common lint && pnpm --filter pixelforge-frontend lint && cargo fmt --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pixelforge/common test && pnpm --filter pixelforge-frontend test && cargo test --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml && ./scripts/run-ai-tests.sh
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pixelforge/common build && pnpm --filter pixelforge-frontend build && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --release
